name: Airport Heights Park
description: Airport Heights Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in North Bend, OR. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.

name: Bandon City Park
open_play_schedule: Open play portable nets furnished otherwise bring your own net.

name: Boys & Girls Club of Southwestern Oregon
description: Come play pickleball at Boys & Girls Club of Southwestern Oregon in Coos Bay, OR! There are 18 hard courts. 8 are outdoors and 10 are indoors. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. A one-time fee is required to play. Players have access to restrooms, water, and lights.

name: North Bend High School
description: North Bend High School is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in North Bend, OR. There are 6 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. Players have access to restrooms. The courts are free.

name: South Western Oregon Community College
description: South Western Oregon Community College is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Coos Bay, OR. There are 9 hard courts. 6 are outdoors and 3 are indoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The courts cannot be reserved.
open_play_schedule: Open Play any day not raining
